no_new_race_conditions.rationale: All patches are synchronous, no new concurrency introduced. File operations remain sequential.

no_performance_regression.rationale: plistlib.load() is marginally slower than read_text() but negligible for pre-submission testing (<100ms). UTF-8 encoding parameter has no performance impact.

all_interfaces_preserved.rationale: All public method signatures unchanged. CheckResult return types identical. Backward compatible.

no_security_vulnerabilities.rationale: No new attack surfaces. plistlib is stdlib, well-audited. No user input directly executed.

all_new_tests_pass.rationale: All 24 existing tests pass. Test fixture updated to use valid plist format.

rollback_plan_documented.rationale: Rollback plans documented in Stage 4. Simple git revert for all patches.

blast_radius_contained.rationale: Changes isolated to pre_submission_testing.py and app_store_assets.py. No downstream dependencies affected.

coding_conventions_followed.rationale: Patches follow existing style: type hints, docstrings, logging, exception handling patterns.

safety_gate.recommendation: APPROVED FOR AUTO-MERGE. All safety checks passed. Patches are minimal, well-tested, and backward compatible.

post_merge_monitoring: Monitor test pass rate in CI/CD
Check for new privacy audit failures (expected: more accurate detection)
Monitor user feedback on app name generation
rollback_triggers: Valid Info.plist files incorrectly flagged as malformed
Valid UTF-8 Swift files incorrectly skipped
User complaints about unexpected app name changes
